critic_findings.message: PUSH CHECKS block has cyclomatic complexity of 11 (base 1 + IS_PUSH branch + &&-chain on phase_exists + 8 further if-branches). Exceeds max of 8. Extract the proof-file validation sequence and the tests.json runner check into named shell functions.

_GIT_ENV (lines 15-21) and init_repo (lines 49-60) are duplicated verbatim from test_enforce_rq_write.py. A conftest.py already exists at engineer/scripts/conftest.py. Move both into conftest.py and import/use them from there.
